title: cestrum ovale
intro: Cestrum ovale, also known as the yellow jessamine or yellow cestrum, is a flowering vine native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Cestrum ovale include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent, making it useful for wound care and skin conditions. Cestrum ovale is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
